# rational_metareasoning_llm

- Canonical title: **Rational Metareasoning for Large Language Models**
- Classification in this repo: **adjacent baseline family** (stop-vs-continue adaptive compute)
- Integration status: **discuss_only**
- Paper-phase priority: **essential adjacent**

Why adjacent (not direct equivalent): this family provides value-of-computation framing for adaptive continuation decisions, but not the same branch-level frontier allocation control space.
